## Checklist
- [ ] `make ci` passes locally (lint → collection → tests → coverage ≥ 85%)
- [ ] New/changed public API has docstrings and is exported in the subpackage `__init__.py`
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
